---
title: "Strategic Marketing"
description: "Strategic marketing, brand positioning, market research, and competitive analysis work."
---

## Brand Audit and Positioning

This section demonstrates strategic marketing judgment beyond dashboard reporting. It highlights how I evaluate brand positioning, audience fit, competitive context, and messaging opportunities.

## Positioning Statement

For hiring managers, recruiters, and business contacts evaluating early-career marketing talent, this portfolio presents Marcos Anton as a candidate who can connect business operations with measurable digital marketing execution. Unlike a resume-only profile, the website shows campaign thinking, analytics fluency, technical communication, and entrepreneurial direction.

## Business Direction

I started my own business and intend to add digital marketing services that help small businesses improve visibility, lead generation, customer relationships, and campaign performance.

## Competitive Benchmarking

| Brand or Competitor | Strength | Opportunity | Strategic Implication |
|---|---|---|---|
| Competitor A | Strong awareness content | Weak conversion path | Build clearer calls to action |
| Competitor B | Polished social proof | Thin SEO coverage | Create search-friendly comparison content |
| Competitor C | Strong paid traffic | Limited retention messaging | Improve lifecycle and email strategy |

## Portfolio Example Benchmark

I pulled public HTML structure from two Quarto portfolio examples to benchmark navigation, resume pages, and content organization. The goal is to model structure, not copy wording.

| Example Source | Useful Pattern | How I Apply It |
|---|---|---|
| [Lucynda Young portfolio](https://cynyng.github.io/portfolio/) | Clear home page, digital marketing tab, marketing analytics tab, presentation, resume, and website analytics. | Keep my site organized around analytics projects, dashboard, presentation, resume, and GA4 measurement. |
| [Jeffrey Hsu resume page](https://hsujeffrey.github.io/hsu-website-portfolio/resume.html) | Resume page includes a PDF download, professional summary, education, experience, and skills. | Use a clickable resume page with PDF/DOCX downloads and sections for education, experience, certificates, and skills. |

The extracted benchmark dataset is saved in [`data/portfolio-example-benchmark.csv`](data/portfolio-example-benchmark.csv), and the reproducible extraction script is saved in [`data/pull-html-examples.R`](data/pull-html-examples.R).

## Skills Demonstrated

- Brand analysis
- Competitive benchmarking
- Strategic communication
- Market positioning
- Customer journey thinking

## Embedded Proof

The sample report below mirrors the PDF template's recommendation to embed evidence such as an SEO or benchmarking export.

<iframe class="proof-frame" src="data/seo-benchmarking-report.html" title="SEO benchmarking report"></iframe>
